arts.sum: Genoa are coming off their first win under Patrick Vieira as they defeated Udinese 2-0 on Sunday, although the outcome of that match was heavily influenced by the hosts being reduced to 10 men for alm...

arts.ttl: Preview: Genoa vs. Torino - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Serie A clash between Genoa and Torino, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
